message:
fix: review cleanup — dead consts, appenddirname regression, ABSTTL edge case

- Remove unused MAX_CLIENTS const from fr-server (now read from runtime)
- Remove unused COMMAND_TIME_BUDGET_MS const from fr-runtime (now on ServerState)
- Fix appenddirname CONFIG GET: use file_name() to return just the directory
  name, not the full parent path (concurrent agent reverted previous fix)
- Fix RESTORE ABSTTL: when absolute timestamp is in the past, set minimal
  TTL (1ms) instead of 0 (which means "no expiry")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
